Unlock unlimited AI-powered city discovery with personalized itineraries, insider recommendations, and premium travel services.

$9.99/month

  • Unlimited monthly itinerary generations
  • Full revision and customization capabilities
  • Priority AI processing
  • Advanced personalization
  • Export itineraries to PDF
  • Detailed activity recommendations
  • Real-time local insights
  • Discounted flights & hotels
  • Free group travel logistics planning

  • All monthly benefits included
  • Unlimited itinerary generations

  • Early access to new cities
  • Enhanced travel services
  • Bonus travel planning tools
  • Advanced AI recommendations
Subscribe Now

$499

  • Lifetime unlimited itineraries
  • Never pay monthly fees again

Travel Platform Notice
Travel Center Hub is a jointly owned travel platform by In City Experience LLC & Expedition America Travel Co LLC.
City Discoverer is a brand of Expedition America Travel Co LLC.
Travel services fulfilled through licensed travel partners and suppliers.

About Travel Center Hub

Travel Center Hub is a travel discovery and booking platform jointly owned by In City Experience LLC and Expedition America Travel Co LLC. The platform helps travelers discover destinations, book travel services, and generate AI-powered travel itineraries through City Discoverer tools and partner travel providers.

Privacy Policy

Travel Center Hub respects your privacy. We collect limited information such as email addresses, usage analytics, and booking information only when necessary to provide travel services and improve the platform. Personal information is never sold and is only shared with travel partners when required to complete bookings or services.

Terms of Use

By using Travel Center Hub you agree to use the platform for lawful travel planning and booking purposes. Travel services are fulfilled through partner travel providers including airlines, hotels, cruise lines, and experience operators. Travel Center Hub is not responsible for supplier changes, pricing updates, cancellations, or service disruptions.

Data Usage

Travel Center Hub may collect usage data including browsing activity, destination searches, and itinerary generation interactions. This information is used to improve AI travel recommendations, personalize travel planning features, and enhance the overall user experience.

How to Use the Site

Use the main navigation to search flights, hotels, cruises, vacation packages, and travel experiences. The Explorer Pass allows members to generate AI-powered travel itineraries and receive personalized travel planning tools. Select any service card or destination to begin planning your trip.

Contact

Email: support@travelcenterhub.com
